title: Soap Bubbles 3D
description: Photoreal soap bubbles, shaded as lit spheres: a see-through core, a Fresnel-bright rim, swirling thin-film interference colours whose bands shift with the film's changing thickness, and crisp specular glares that slide across each bubble as the light slowly orbits — plus a soft reflected window-glare. Bubbles jostle, wobble on surface tension and occasionally pop. Bubble count, size, light orbit, film thickness, iridescence and wobble are live and mappable.
